channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: South Carolina returns to the NCAA title game and gets a rematch of 2022 against Bueckers and UConn
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The journey has been more challenging than usual, but Dawn Staley and defending national champion South Carolina are still getting the job done.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Dawn Staley has never lost a national championship game in three trips as South Carolina's coach. Part of the key to winning those decisive games? Forgetting about what happened the last time she was there. And this time, that was only a year ago.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Korda won't defend Match Play title on the weekend after a rough day for the world's top players
item.description: NORTH LAS VEGAS, Nev. (AP) — Nelly Korda, the world's top-ranked player, won't be around this weekend to defend her T-Mobile Match Play championship. She needed to defeat Ariya Jutanugarn, but lost 1-up Friday on the final day of round-robin play and failed to qualify for the round of 16.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: On Oracle Park’s 25th birthday, SF Giants ring in new era in multiple ways
item.description: The 26th home opener at Oracle Park — Buster Posey's first as team president — was also the first without Willie Mays or the Oakland A's.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Mookie Betts makes decision on Dodgers' White House visit after skipping with Red Sox
item.description: After skipping a visit to the White House in 2019 with the Boston Red Sox, Mookie Betts made his decision on the Dodgers' trip this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dale Earnhardt Jr. shifts gears with his No. 8 logo to avoid potential conflict with Lamar Jackson
item.description: NASCAR Hall of Famer Dale Earnhardt Jr. is shifting gears with his No. 8 merchandising. Earnhardt announced on social media Friday that he has secured the right to use a stylized version of No. 8 and will forgo the original No. 8 logo used by his NASCAR team, JR Motorsports.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Hunter and Shedeur Sanders put on a show for all 32 NFL teams at Colorado's pro day
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Shedeur Sanders insisted Friday he doesn't necessarily need the bright lights of Broadway or the Bellagio at the outset of his NFL journey. He suggested he could just as easily thrive for the “Dawg Pound” fan base in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON and PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers' Mookie Betts will make White House visit after skipping previous celebration under Trump
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers shortstop Mookie Betts said he will attend next week's World Series championship celebration at the White House after he declined to attend a previous ceremony during President Donald Trump's first term.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Creighton scores in portal with ex-Big Ten freshman of year Freeman and high-scoring Graves
item.description: Former Iowa forward Owen Freeman, the 2023-24 Big Ten freshman of the year, has signed with Creighton. The 6-foot-10 Freeman averaged 16.7 points and 6.7 rebounds in 19 starts this season for the Hawkeyes before missing the final two months following finger surgery.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bryson DeChambeau lauds Trump as ‘great ambassador for the game’ as PGA Tour, LIV Golf talks continue
item.description: Amid continued talks between the PGA Tour and the financial backers of LIV Golf, Bryson DeChambeau is happy to have President Donald Trump as an "ambassador" for the sport.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Navy SEAL Clint Bruce on relationship with Ohio State's Ryan Day, helping college football stars
item.description: In an exclusive sit-down with Fox News Digital, Clint Bruce shares details of the mutual respect between him and Ohio State's Ryan Day and the lessons his military service taught him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Parents charged after brawl at youth street hockey tournament in New Jersey
item.description: A youth street hockey tournament in New Jersey turned violent after parents stormed the court and got involved in a brawl that began among players. Three people have been charged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's Final Four brings powerhouses UConn, UCLA, Texas and South Carolina to Tampa
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Three of four teams in the women's Final Four are No. 1 seeds. None of the four have lost more than three games this season. All but one have been the top-ranked team in the country at some point.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs home opener: Some things to know for fans heading to Wrigley Field on Friday
item.description: CHICAGO — For fans attending Wrigley Field for the Cubs homer opener Friday afternoon, there are some numbers to keep in mind. The Wrigley Field fan text messaging service is available in the ballpark to report issues in the park without leaving your seat at the game.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox fall to Twins, 6-1, to drop rubber match of 3-game series after lengthy rain delay on South Side
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Harrison Bader and Byron Buxton hit home runs to back Pablo López's solid start, and the Minnesota Twins beat the Chicago White Sox, 6-1, on Wednesday after rain delayed the start by nearly 3 1/2 hours.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vejmelka makes 33 saves as Utah HC stays in playoff hunt
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah is not out of the playoff hunt just yet. Karel Vejmelka made 33 saves in his 18th consecutive start in goal, as the Utah Hockey Club stayed alive in the chase for the NHL playoffs with a hard-fought 3-1 victory over Calgary Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thunder rout Bulls 145-117 for 10th straight win, improve to 28-1 vs the East
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander had 27 points and 12 assists in just 27 minutes, and the Oklahoma City Thunder rolled to a 145-117 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Monday night for their 10th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Amalie Arena transforms for NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: Amalie Arena is all about basketball for the next week, as the NCAA Women's Final Four takes over Tampa with events around the city.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: SF Giants listed among Forbes' most valuable MLB teams
item.description: (KRON) -- As the 2025 Major League Baseball season starts in March, Forbes released its annual list of the most valuable teams. The San Francisco Giants were listed as the fifth-most valuable team in MLB, according to Forbes' list released on March 26.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Duke's great D sends Blue Devils to their 18th Final Four with an 85-65 win over Alabama
item.description: Duke freshman Cooper Flagg swooped across the paint and swatted an Alabama player’s shot completely off the court. The ball landed in the stands. Flagg and the Blue Devils -- they’re headed to the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Fox 5
